2299120.name: ITRP _ Aero Star - Soundtrack
2299120.description:
Energy! Drive! And not only that
Feel ITRP _ Aero Star through it music. Each small segment of the game has an individual track that reflects its mood.
But only here the music is an unsplitted form, the way it was originally designed for the game.



I am the developer of this game. I created all its elements from code to sprites by my own and put a lot of effort making this music authentic, energetic and enjoyable. Thanks to everyone who rated my music and I hope you find it worthy.

Also if you liked the original game, you can use this soundtrack as a way to further support me and my games.
